Landing.subtitle: Drop in an entire hike's worth of photos — AI culls, critiques, writes the trip report, and plans your return.
Landing.feature_agents_body: Culling / Critic / Story / Planner — orchestrated via LangGraph supervisor with HITL interrupts.
Landing.feature_model_body: Q-Align + landscape LoRA. Open weights, self-hostable, target PLCC > 0.78.
Landing.feature_mcp_body: EXIF / Weather / Sun-Moon are standalone MCP servers any LLM client can install.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.tokens_hint: For the Lightroom plugin / scripts / your own tools.
Settings.token_one_time_warning: ⚠ This is the only time this token is shown. Copy it now.
Settings.piaa_hint: After 50 annotations we train a personal aesthetic model just for you.
